contactPage.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
contactPage.subtitle: Complete this form to schedule a meeting with our team.
contactPage.whyInfoTitle: One last step before we connect
contactPage.whyInfoBody: Completing this form is the first step towards a successful collaboration. Knowing a bit about your company and your challenges allows us to prepare for our conversation and arrive with ideas that truly add value. We look forward to speaking with you!

labels.challenge: What is your main challenge or need?

validation.fullName: Name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.challenge: Your description must be at least 10 characters.

errors.server: There was a problem submitting your request. Please try again.

header.title: Thank you for your interest!
header.subtitle: We have received your request and our team will be in touch with you shortly.

cta.title: Take the next step
cta.description: For greater agility and to secure a time that suits you, you can book a 15-minute call directly on our calendar.
